instruction: Find and click the meal plan dropdown or selector on this page
observedDescription: DisclosureTriangle for 'Meal Plans and Additional Rates 2026 – 2027'

description: Wait after: Open meal plan dropdown

instruction: Select the option "Room & 12 Classic Meals + 15 Dining Dollars" from the meal plan list or dropdown
observedDescription: Disclosure triangle for 'Meal Plans and Additional Rates 2026 – 2027'

description: Wait after: Select meal plan option

instruction: Find and click the room type filter or column/tab for "Single" rooms
observedDescription: Disclosure triangle for 'New Resident Rates 2026 – 2027', which may contain room type filters or columns for 'Single' rooms.

description: Wait after: Select Single room type

instruction: Extract undergraduate hall names and prices
description: Extract hall names and prices for Single room with selected meal plan

You are encouraged to read the contract terms carefully before signing.Cost estimates provided on Financial Aid notifications calculate an estimated cost for housing of $15,858 based on an average room rate and the All Classic Meal plan.Constant Rate: If you live continuously with University Housing, your rate structure will stay locked in at the 2026–2027 rates (for up to 4 consecutive years). In the future, if you select a different room type or meal plan with University Housing, you will pay the 2026–2027 rate structure for those choices.
